name: IDIOPATHIC PULMONARY HEMOSIDEROSIS
definition: IPH = probable autoimmune process with clinical + radiologic remissions + exacerbations

demographics.Age: (a)   chronic form: most commonly < 10 years of age

dominant_finding: diffuse homogeneous areas of ground-glass attenuation (during exacerbation)
discriminating_features: bilateral patchy alveolar-filling pattern (= blood in alveoli); initially for 2-3 days with return
reticular pattern (= deposition of hemosiderin in interstitial space) later
hilar lymph nodes may be enlarged during acute episodes
diffuse homogeneous areas of ground-glass attenuation (during exacerbation)

general: bilateral patchy alveolar-filling pattern (= blood in alveoli); initially for 2-3 days with return
reticular pattern (= deposition of hemosiderin in interstitial space) later
hilar lymph nodes may be enlarged during acute episodes
CT: diffuse homogeneous areas of ground-glass attenuation (during exacerbation)
nodules + patchy areas of ground-glass attenuation (subacute phase)
